entities.name: FUSARIUM SPP.
entities.description: Fungal species that are components of seed mycoflora and are implicated in pod rots

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: An agricultural crop whose pods and seeds are affected by Fusarium and zearalenone

entities.name: POD ROTS
entities.description: A disease condition of groundnut pods implicated by Fusarium spp.

entities.name: MYCOTOXINS
entities.description: Toxic compounds produced by certain fungi

entities.name: ZEARALENONE
entities.description: An oestrogenic mycotoxin found in cereal grains, sesame, and groundnuts

entities.name: DIACETOXYSCIRPENOL
entities.description: A mycotoxin produced by some species of the Fusarium genus

entities.name: NEOSOLANIOL
entities.description: A mycotoxin produced by some species of the Fusarium genus

entities.name: CEREAL GRAINS
entities.description: Crops in which zearalenone has mainly been found

entities.name: SESAME
entities.description: A crop in which zearalenone occurs naturally

entities.name: CULTURAL CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental or management factors that affect the production of zearalenone

entities.name: FUSARIUM OXYSPORUM
entities.description: A toxigenic strain of fungus that produces zearalenone in groundnut seeds

relationships.description: found in seed mycoflora of pods
